mnemonics.title: Sorting Algorithm Complexity
mnemonics.content: BSI are n-squared: Bubble Sort O(n^2), Selection Sort O(n^2), Insertion Sort O(n^2) in worst case.

mnemonics.title: Binary Search Prerequisite
mnemonics.content: Binary = Bisect Sorted: Binary search needs sorted data and bisects (halves) the search space each time.

mnemonics.title: Stable Sorts
mnemonics.content: BIM is Stable: Bubble, Insertion, Merge sorts are stable. Selection sort is NOT stable.

mnemonics.title: Sorting Methods
mnemonics.content: BuSI: Bubble (swap adjacent), Selection (find min), Insertion (insert in place) - the three basic sorting techniques.
